mapper.select: SELECT SCRP_TRGT_ID , SRCH_KWD FROM TB_ARVU_SCRP_TRGT_L WHERE PROG_STAT_CD = '00' ORDER BY REG_DTM ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_ARVU_SCRP_TRGT_L SET PROG_STAT_CD = #{progStatCd} , LST_SCRP_DTM = CASE WHEN #{progStatCd} = '02' THEN SUBSTR(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(3), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s%f'), 1, 17) ELSE LST_SCRP_DTM END , CHNG_ID = 'SYSTEM' , CHNG_DTM = SUBSTR(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(3), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s%f'), 1, 17) WHERE SCRP_TRGT_ID = #{scrpTrgtId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_ARVU_EXTL_REVW_L ( EXTL_REVW_ID , SORC_DVCD , CNTN , RTNG , PLAC_ID , FILE_GRP_ID , REG_ID , REG_DTM , CHNG_ID , CHNG_DTM ) VALUES ( #{extlRevwId} , #{sorcDvcd} , #{cntn} , #{rtng} , #{placId} , #{fileGrpId} , 'SYSTEM' , SUBSTR(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(3), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s%f'), 1, 17) , 'SYSTEM' , SUBSTR(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(3), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s%f'), 1, 17) )
